name: Access
description: Remove barriers to reading in underserved areas.

name: Equity
description: Meet each child's unique needs fairly.

name: Joy
description: Foster warmth and wonder around reading.

name: Partnership
description: Collaborate with nonprofits, schools, and hospitals.

name: Future
description: Invest in the lifelong benefits of literacy.

name: Stewardship
description: Use our resources responsibly and efficiently.
